entries.reason: spec gate failed due to unchecked open-question checkbox
entries.guardrailCandidate: do not use unchecked checkbox when there are no open questions

entries.reason: Single Responsibility — spec addresses only the Choice Format wording enforcement in flow-plan skill template.; Unambiguous Requirements — requirements use "shall", "no exceptions", "no free-form" with verifiable conditions; no vague adjectives.; Complete Context — each requirement has a trigger (When…) and expected behavior (shall…).; No Hardcoded Secrets — no source code or secrets present in this spec.; No Silent Error Swallowing — no error handling patterns discussed; inapplicable by nature.; Prioritize Requirements — three requirements total; priority ordering not required below the threshold.; Impact on Existing Features — "No unrelated skill template is modified by this spec" states impact explicitly.; Bounded Resource Usage — no recursive processing or bulk loading involved; inapplicable by nature.; Changes Require Test Coverage — requirement 3 and Acceptance Criteria explicitly require tests for the wording change.; Spec Includes Test Strategy — the spec states tests shall exist and pass, but does not describe what to test (e.g., substring match, regex check) or how (unit test runner, file read assertion); the strategy is absent.; Synthesize Draft, Do Not Copy — spec is organized and abstracted; no raw draft content copied verbatim.; Record Unresolved Points as Open Questions — Open Questions section is present and explicitly states "None".; Include 'Why This Approach' Rationale — "Why This Approach" section explains the targeted-change rationale.; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — no CLI commands or options are modified; inapplicable by nature.; Exit Code Contract — no command exit behavior is changed; inapplicable by nature.
spec gate failed due to missing explicit test strategy
entries.resolution: add Test Strategy section with target assertions and test runner
entries.guardrailCandidate: spec must describe what and how to test, not only require tests
